title: Friends
big_question: Làm quen với bạn mới, mình nói những gì nhỉ?
grammar: What's your name? - I'm (Misty). / My name's (Misty).
How old are you? - I'm (seven).

mini_games.prompt: This number comes after five and before seven.
This is the color of the sky on a sunny day.
A: What's your name? B: _______ name's Flash.

title: At school
big_question: Chúng ta học tập bằng những dụng cụ nào?
grammar: What's this? - It's a (pencil).
Is it a (pen)? - Yes, it is. / No, it isn't.
Imperatives: Open your book. / Sit at your desk. / Pass me a ruler, please.
phonics: Sound /æ/ (a): cat, fat rat, black hat, bag

mini_games.prompt: You use this to write. It's long and thin.
You use this to erase mistakes.
A: Is it a pen? B: No, it ______ .

title: Let's play
big_question: Giới thiệu một người bạn và miêu tả món đồ chơi yêu thích ra sao?
grammar: What's his/her name? - His/Her name's (Ben).
How old is he/she? - He's/She's (seven).
What's his/her favourite toy? - His/Her favourite toy's his/her (ball).
It's + a/an + adjective + noun (e.g., a big blue plane).
skills: Asking and answering about someone else's name, age, and favourite toy

mini_games.prompt: You fly this in the sky on a windy day.
This toy is a small vehicle for racing.
It's _______ ugly monster.

title: Pet show
big_question: Các con vật đang ở đâu thì nói làm sao?
grammar: Prepositions: in, on, under
Where is the (frog)? - It's (in) the (bag).
I like (dogs). / I don't like (rats).
What about you? - I like (elephants), too! / I do. / I don't.
phonics: Sound /ɪ/ (i): sit, skip, pink, Tim, Kim, silly, sister
skills: Asking for and giving opinions about animals

mini_games.prompt: This animal is very big and has a long trunk.
It's a small, green animal that can jump and lives in water.
The cat is _______ the chair.

title: Lunchtime
big_question: Bạn có đồ ăn gì thì nói làm sao?
grammar: I've got a (cheese sandwich). / I haven't got a (cake).
Have we got any (cheese)? - Yes, we have. / No, we haven't.
skills: Talking about what food you have
Asking and answering about food items

mini_games.prompt: It's a long, yellow fruit.
This number comes after thirteen and before fifteen.
I _______ got a cheese sandwich.

title: Free time
big_question: Vào thời gian rảnh, bạn của mình thường làm gì nhỉ?
grammar: I (play football) on (Saturdays).
Do you (watch TV) at the weekend? - Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
Distinguishing 'play' (with sports/instruments) and 'go' (with -ing verbs).
phonics: Sound /ʌ/ (u): sun, fun, duck, mud, Mum, run, jump
skills: Asking and answering about free time activities
value: Asking for help when you need it
speaking_prompts: What do you do on Mondays?

mini_games.prompt: The day after Thursday.
You do this activity in water.
A: Do you play tennis? B: Yes, I _______ .

title: The old house
big_question: Có những phòng nào trong nhà của bạn?
grammar: There's a (monster) in the (bedroom).
There are (four cats) in the (living room).
Is there a (plane)? - Yes, there is. / No, there isn't.
Are there any (rats)? - Yes, there are. / No, there aren't.
How many (cars) are there? - There are (four).
phonics: Sound /h/ (h): house, hairy, hall, happy, hot, hat
skills: Describing a house and its rooms
Asking and answering about the existence of things
clil_topic: Geography: Types of homes around the world

mini_games.prompt: You sleep in this room.
You walk up and down these to go to different floors.
_______ there a ghost in the house?

title: Get dressed
grammar: Do you like this (hat)? / Do you like these (shoes)? - Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
Present continuous for clothes: (Olivia)'s wearing a red sweater.
Is he/she wearing (a blue T-shirt)? - Yes, he/she is. / No, he/she isn't.
phonics: Consonant clusters /sp/ and /st/: stripes, spots, stairs, stop, spider, steak
skills: Asking for and giving opinions about clothes

mini_games.prompt: You wear these on your feet, inside your shoes.
This is a piece of clothing with a pattern of lines.
Do you like _______ shoes? (pointing to shoes near you)

title: The robot
big_question: Bạn có thể làm những gì với cơ thể của mình?
grammar: I/He/She can (stand on one leg).
I/He/She can't (swim).
Can you/he/she (dance)? - Yes, I/he/she can. / No, I/he/she can't.
phonics: Sound /g/ (g): green, bag, good, big, great, grey, go, get, got, game, give, frog, dog, leg, fingers, ugly
skills: Asking and answering about what someone can/can't do
Giving and following instructions for assembly

mini_games.prompt: You have five of these on each hand.
You use a string to do this activity in the wind.
_______ you play the piano?

title: At the beach
big_question: Rủ các bạn cùng chơi ở biển thì nói sao nhỉ?
grammar: Suggestions with Let's: Let's (play the guitar).
Responding to suggestions: Good idea. / I'm not sure. / Sorry, I don't want to.
Where's the (blue book)? - It's in the (green bag).
Where are the (orange books)? - They're in the (black bag).
phonics: Long sound /i:/ (ee, ea): see, tree, beach, eat, ice cream, peas, cheese
skills: Asking and answering about the location of objects (singular/plural)
Talking about holiday activities and places
clil_topic: Geography: Landscapes and places (beach, mountains, etc.)

mini_games.prompt: You build this with sand and water at the beach.
You can see lots of animals and go on rides here.
Let's _______ to music.
